title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 40.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Bute,
    Who played on a silver-gilt flute;
    She played several jigs,
    To her uncle's white pigs,
    That amusing Young Lady of Bute.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 40." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
